title: Animal Pens Expansion - Naturalist
description: This is addon for Animal Pens that enables Naturalist mobs.
body:
# Animal Pen Expansion - Naturalist Lite

This mod is a compatibility addon that allows mobs from Naturalist Lite to work with the pens from Animal Pens, making animal management easier and more consistent.

## Features

Animal Cage can pick up:
- Snail - can be picked up with bucket
- Bear - can be fed with bear tempt items and sheared
- Snake - can be fed with snake tempt items
- Coral Snake - can be fed with snake tempt items
- Rattlesnake - can be fed with snake tempt items
- Deer - can be fed with apple
- Caterpillar - can be fed with flowers
- Rhino - no extra interactions
- Lion - no extra interactions
- Elephant - no extra interactions
- Zebra - can be fed with wheat, sugar, hay block, apple, golden carrot and golden apple
- Giraffe - can be fed with giraffe food items
- Hippo - can be fed with melon
- Boar - can be fed with boar food items
- (Nat4+) Alligator - can be fed with alligator food items and produce eggs
- (Nat4+) Lizard - can be fed with lizard tempt items
- (Nat4+) Tortoise - can be fed with tortoise tempt items and produce eggs
- (Nat1.0+) Duck - can be fed with duck food items and produce eggs

Bird Catcher Pickable:
- Butterfly - can be fed with flowers
- Firefly - no extra interactions
- Bluejay - can be fed with bird food items
- Canary - can be fed with bird food items
- Cardinal - can be fed with bird food items
- Robin - can be fed with bird food items
- Vulture - can be fed with rotten flesh
- (Nat4+) Dragonfly - no extra interactions
- (Nat4+) Duck - can be fed with duck food items and produce eggs
- (Nat1.0+) Finch - can be fed with bird food items
- (Nat1.0+) Sparrow - can be fed with bird food items

Water Container Pickable:
- (Nat4+) Catfish - can be picked up with water bucket
- (Nat4+) Bass - can be picked up with water bucket

## Sides:

Server side adds all interactions.

## 🛠️ Requirements:

📌 **[Animal Pen](https://modrinth.com/mod/animalpens)** (Required).  
📖 **[Naturalist Lite](https://modrinth.com/mod/naturalist)** (Required).
